description: Unsafe non-null assertion (!) used to return undefined, indicating potential null reference issues. This pattern appears multiple times with TODO comments referencing GH#18217.
suggested_fix: Replace undefined! with proper null checks and error handling. Investigate the root cause of why undefined is being returned and handle it gracefully.

description: Type assertion 'as any' used to bypass type checking in NodeLinks construction, which can lead to runtime errors and hide type incompatibilities.
suggested_fix: Refactor NodeLinks to have proper type definitions and remove the 'as any' assertion. Use proper type guards or interfaces.

description: Mutable update of node properties with 'as any' type assertion, indicating poor type safety and potential maintenance issues.
suggested_fix: Define proper type extensions or interfaces for nodes that need additional properties, avoiding 'as any' mutations.

description: Double type assertion 'as unknown as T[]' used to bypass type system, which can mask type errors and cause runtime issues.
suggested_fix: Use proper type guards, runtime checks, or refactor the function to return the correct type without assertions.

description: TODO comment referencing GH#18217 indicates technical debt and incomplete implementation that needs to be addressed.
suggested_fix: Resolve the GitHub issue #18217 and remove the TODO comment. Implement proper null safety.

description: Error handling in file reading only logs error message and continues with empty text, potentially hiding important I/O failures.
suggested_fix: Improve error handling to distinguish between different types of errors and potentially rethrow critical failures.

description: Error handling in file writing silently catches errors and only logs messages, which could hide critical write failures.
suggested_fix: Add more robust error handling with proper error propagation for write operations.

description: God file pattern: checker.ts is over 54,000 lines long, containing massive amounts of type checking logic with tight coupling between components.
suggested_fix: Refactor into smaller, focused modules with clear separation of concerns and well-defined interfaces.

description: God file pattern: parser.ts is over 10,000 lines long, containing the entire parsing logic in a single monolithic file.
suggested_fix: Break down into smaller parsing modules by language construct (expressions, statements, declarations, etc.).

description: TODO comment indicating incomplete refactoring or missing implementation for class member handling.
suggested_fix: Complete the refactoring mentioned in the TODO comment and remove technical debt.
